name: Example: NHS RFP (synthetic)
input_text:
INVITATION TO TENDER

Issued by: Imperial College Healthcare NHS Trust
Reference: ICHT/2026/IT/0042
Value: £2.4M over 36 months
Deadline: 2026-06-15

1. SCOPE

The Trust seeks a supplier to deliver a new clinical workflow integration platform connecting our Cerner Millennium EPR with the NHS Spine, GP Connect, and the National Care Records Service. The platform must be live in production within 9 months of contract award.

2. MANDATORY REQUIREMENTS (PASS/FAIL)

2.1 [REQ-001] Bidder shall hold ISO 27001 certification valid for the contract term.
2.2 [REQ-002] Bidder shall demonstrate evidence of NHS Data Security and Protection Toolkit (DSPT) compliance.
2.3 [REQ-003] Bidder must provide a clinical safety case in line with DCB0129 and DCB0160 standards.
2.4 [REQ-004] Bidder shall have delivered at least 3 comparable NHS Trust integrations in the last 5 years.
2.5 [REQ-005] Solution must support FHIR R4 and HL7 v2.5.

3. SCORED REQUIREMENTS (60% quality / 40% price)

3.1 [REQ-101] Quality of technical approach (25%) — clarity of integration architecture, risk management, methodology.
3.2 [REQ-102] Implementation plan (15%) — realistic phasing, clinical engagement, go-live strategy.
3.3 [REQ-103] Team and credibility (10%) — named team, relevant past projects, clinical safety expertise.
3.4 [REQ-104] Social value (10%) — Trust expects bidders to demonstrate how the contract will deliver against the Public Services (Social Value) Act 2012 and the Trust's net zero commitments.

4. EVALUATION METHODOLOGY

Most economically advantageous tender (MEAT). Quality questions scored out of 10 with named evaluators from the Trust's Digital Programme Board. Pass/fail mandatories evaluated first; failure on any disqualifies.

5. SUBMISSION

Responses limited to 40 pages plus appendices. Late submissions will not be accepted.
